fields.name: reportId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the reported scam/fraud incident

fields.name: reportDate
fields.description: Timestamp of when the report was submitted

fields.name: sourceDeployment
fields.description: The system that originated the report (customer_services)

fields.name: targetDeployment
fields.description: The system that received the report (risk_and_compliance)

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Level of severity for the reported incident (high)

children.name: detectionDate
children.description: Timestamp of when the incident was detected

children.name: reportedByStaffId
children.description: Unique identifier for the staff member who reported the incident

children.name: reportedByName
children.description: Name of the staff member who reported the incident (Sarah Johnson)

children.name: customerName
children.description: Full name of the affected customer (John Michael Smith)

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Account number for the affected customer's account

children.name: customerTier
children.description: Tier level of the affected customer's account (premium)

fields.name: fraudDetails
fields.description: Additional details about the reported fraud incident

children.name: fraudDescription
children.description: Detailed description of the fraudulent activity

children.name: amountInvolved
children.description: Amount involved in the fraudulent transaction (45000.00)

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency used for the fraudulent transaction (GBP)

children.name: transactionReference
children.description: Unique reference for the fraudulent transaction (TXN-2024-156489)

children.name: fraudulentRecipient
children.description: Name of the fraudulent recipient (Unknown - International Account)

children.name: recipientCountry
children.description: Country where the fraudulent recipient is located (NI)

children.name: transactionStatus
children.description: Current status of the fraudulent transaction (blocked)

fields.name: riskIndicators
fields.description: List of risk indicators detected for the reported incident

fields.name: actionsTaken
fields.description: List of actions taken in response to the reported incident

fields.name: additionalNotes
fields.description: Additional notes or comments about the reported incident (Customer confirmed unauthorized transaction. Evidence of phishing email compromising credentials. Escalating to risk and compliance for further investigation.)

fields.name: escalationRequired
fields.description: Indicates whether escalation is required for the reported incident (true)

fields.name: documentationRef
fields.description: Reference to supporting documentation or evidence related to the reported incident (DOC-CSA-2024-001847)
